sigma.title: WMI Persistence - Script Event Consumer File Write
WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers Activity Via Scrcons.EXE DLL Load
WMI Persistence - Command Line Event Consumer

osquery.name: t1546_003_suid
osquery.query_text: SELECT path, username, groupname, permissions FROM suid_bin;

osquery.name: t1546_003_proc_priv
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, gid FROM processes WHERE uid = 0 AND parent != 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1546_003_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

sigma_matches.title: WMI Persistence - Script Event Consumer File Write
WMI ActiveScriptEventConsumers Activity Via Scrcons.EXE DLL Load

executions.reason: Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 3 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
